data.title: Third-Largest US Bank Adds $81,000,000,000,000 To Customer’s Account Balance in Massive Payment Error
data.description:
The third-largest bank in the US accidentally credited trillions of dollars to a customer’s balance in a massive payment error, according to a new report. While attempting to add $280 to the customer’s balance, Citigroup mistakenly credited the client with $81 trillion, reports the Financial Times. The payment, for an account in Brazil, was manually […]
The post Third-Largest US Bank Adds...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/01/third-largest-us-bank-adds-81000000000000-to-customers-account-balance-in-massive-payment-error/

data.title: Vitalik: Fusaka upgrade will still need to be implemented in 2025, and we hope to launch the relevant test network the day after Pectra upgrade
data.description: Vitalik said in a post on X: "In 2025, we need to implement the Fusaka upgrade (note: the next upgrade after Pectra) on Ethereum Layer1, equipped with PeerDAS, preferably with the blob target/limit set to 48/72. Our goal is to launch a Fusaka testnet with these blob parameters the day after Pectra goes online."
